content.title: PENGU is the official coin of Pudgy Penguins.
content.description: Pudgy Penguins has become the face of crypto with one of the most influential communities in the industry. From large companies wearing the Penguin, to being featured in ETF commercials, to garnering millions of followers and over 100 billion views, the Pengu has become a cultural icon making PENGU the world’s social currency.

content.title: About Stellar
content.description: Stellar is an open-source, decentralized network designed to facilitate the fast and low-cost transfer of value across different currencies and assets globally.

content.title: What is Hyperliquid about?
content.description: Hyperliquid is a layer one (L1) blockchain best known for perpetual futures and spot trading. Beyond its flagship DEX trading platform, the ecosystem supports borrowing, lending, real world assets (RWAs), and a full-fledged Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), making it a leading force in decentralized finance (defi).

content.title: About Sui (SUI)
content.description: Sui is a Layer 1 blockchain designed for global adoption by providing a high-speed and secure environment for digital asset ownership.

content.title: Aptos Overview
content.description: Aptos is a new, independent high-performance PoS Layer 1 project focused on delivering the safest and most scalable Layer 1 blockchain in the world. The Aptos blockchain leverages the Move programming language and the Move VM for application development, which are created and optimized for blockchain use cases. The team is comprised of the original creators, researchers, designers, and builders of Diem, the blockchain that was first built to serve this purpose. Aptos raised $200m from a16z, Multicoin, Binance and others. Aptos launched Devnet in mid March, incentivized testnet in late May and targets Q3 for mainnet launch.

content.title: What is Hedera?
content.description: Hedera is a decentralized public network where developers can build secure, fair applications with near real-time consensus. The platform is owned and governed by a council of global innovators including Avery Dennison, Boeing, Deutsche Telekom, DLA Piper, FIS (WorldPay), Google, IBM, LG Electronics, Magalu, Nomura, Swirlds, Tata Communications, University College London (UCL), Wipro, and Zain Group.

content.title: About Bitcoin (BTC)
content.description: Bitcoin is the world's first decentralized cryptocurrency that enables peer-to-peer electronic cash transactions without intermediaries like banks or governments.

content.title: What is Monero (XMR)?
content.description: Monero (XMR) is the top privacy-centric cryptocurrency based on the CryptoNote protocol, a secure, private and untraceable currency system. Monero uses a special kind of cryptography to ensure that all of its transactions are  remain 100% unlinkable and untraceable. In an increasingly transparent world, you can see why something like Monero can become so desirable.

content.title: About XRP
content.description: XRP is a decentralized digital asset designed for high-performance global payments and efficient asset exchange on the XRP Ledger Layer 1 network.

content.title: About Solana (SOL)
content.description: Solana is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain built for mass adoption, offering a fast and low-cost environment for decentralized applications.

nfts.name: Winds of Yawanawa by Yawanawa and Refik Anadol
